title: Montluçon Communauté
summary: Montluçon Communauté is the communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, centred on the town of Montluçon. It is located in the Allier department, in the Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes region, central France. Created in 2017, its seat is in Montluçon. Its area is 377.8 km2. Its population was 60,617 in 2019, of which 34,361 in Montluçon proper.
text:
Montluçon Communauté is the communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, centred on the town of Montluçon. It is located in the Allier department, in the Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes region, central France. Created in 2017, its seat is in Montluçon. Its area is 377.8 km2. Its population was 60,617 in 2019, of which 34,361 in Montluçon proper.
